name: CERN
description: European Organization for Nuclear Research – Home of the Large Hadron Collider

name: Mauna Kea Observatories
description: World's premier astronomical observatory site on a dormant volcano in Hawaii

name: Very Large Array
description: Iconic radio telescope array in New Mexico (featured in Contact and other films)

name: Kennedy Space Center
description: NASA's primary launch site – rockets, space shuttles, and space nerd paradise

name: Royal Observatory Greenwich
description: Historic observatory at the Prime Meridian (0° longitude)

name: Arecibo Observatory
description: Famous giant radio telescope in Puerto Rico (legendary in astronomy)
